Extract Shared Memory Name

Source: R/sora.R
shared_name.Rd

Extract the SHM region name from a shared object. This name can be passed to map_shared() to open the same region in another process.

Usage

shared_name(x)

Arguments

x

a shared object as returned by sora() or map_shared().

Value

A character string identifying the shared memory region.

See also

map_shared() to open a shared region by name.

Examples

x <- sora(rnorm(100))
shared_name(x)
#> [1] "/sora_19a7_2"
